status_notes: Acquired by Harte-Hanks 2001; brand dissolved into Aberdeen Group Holdings under SFG Capital
Acquired by Compaq 1998; Compaq then acquired by HP 2002
Still active as Oracle Corporation; major database and cloud vendor
Acquired by SAP 2010; product line continued as SAP Sybase
Acquired by IBM 2001; continued as IBM Informix
Filed bankruptcy 2009; assets acquired by Rackable Systems (renamed SGI); that SGI acquired by HPE 2016
HP Inc. and Hewlett Packard Enterprise split 2015; both active
Still active as Software AG; acquired by Silver Lake 2023
Publisher of the study; same as ENT001
